sql.if: and(b.id is not null or b.activity_id !=#{not_activityId})

mapper.select: select count(1) from lkt_group_goods a inner join lkt_group_activity b on a.activity_id=b.id and a.recycle=0

select count(1) from lkt_product_list a left join lkt_product_class cls on cls.cid= substring_index(substring_index(a.product_class, '-', 2), '-', -1) left join lkt_brand_class brand on brand.brand_id= a.brand_id

select count(distinct a.id) from lkt_group_goods a inner join lkt_group_activity ac on ac.id=a.activity_id inner join lkt_product_list b on a.goods_id=b.id inner join lkt_configure attr on attr.pid=b.id and attr.recycle=b.recycle left join lkt_group_open op on op.activity_id=ac.id and op.goods_id=a.goods_id
